name: Daddy's Cash
description_short: 305 PawnShops is a family-operated pawn shop group serving the Miami/South Florida area since 1985, offering collateral-based loans, jewelry sales, and gold buying services.
description_long:
305 PawnShops was founded by Eduardo Jimenez, a Colombian entrepreneur who recognized opportunity in the pawn industry and expanded from Colombia to Miami in 1977. The company has operated in the midtown Miami area since 1985 and remains family-operated, positioning itself as a community-focused financial service provider in South Florida. The business grew from the founder's successful pawn operations abroad and established roots in the local Miami market over nearly four decades.

305 PawnShops offers traditional pawn shop services including pawning items for collateral-based loans, buying jewelry and gold, and selling merchandise. Their website emphasizes personalized and customized jewelry designs and positions themselves as a source for personal loans secured by collateral. They operate multiple locations across the Miami area and encourage customers to visit in person or contact them by phone for assistance with pawning questions.

The company distinguishes itself through its family operation model and long-standing presence in Miami since 1985. They emphasize "award-winning" status and position customer service as a core value, promising honesty, respect, and treating customers as family members. Their founder's international background and successful track record in the pawn industry provide credibility within their market.

305 PawnShops is a legitimate pawn operation with established history, though like all pawn shops, customers should understand that pawning requires surrendering collateral and paying interest/fees to retrieve items. The website provides limited detail on specific loan terms, interest rates, or fee structures, which is typical for pawn shops but means customers must contact directly for pricing. Service quality appears consistent with industry standards for traditional pawn operations.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Nearly 40-year operating history in Miami (since 1985) demonstrates stability and local market knowledge
Family-operated business with founder's successful international pawn experience provides credibility
Multiple locations across Miami/South Florida area for customer convenience
Emphasis on personalized jewelry designs and customization services
Award-winning pawn shop recognition within their market
Available by phone for customer inquiries and assistance with pawning questions
Established reputation as a trusted community lender in midtown Miami
cons: Website lacks transparency on specific loan terms, interest rates, and fee structures—customers must call for quotes
No online loan application or quick quote system; requires in-person visit or phone contact
Limited information about loan-to-value ratios or what items they accept for collateral
Pawn model requires surrendering physical items, creating risk if items are not redeemed
No mention of customer reviews or ratings directly on their website to verify service quality claims
best_for: Miami/South Florida residents with jewelry, gold, or personal items to pawn or sell quickly
Customers seeking collateral-based loans without credit checks
Individuals buying quality jewelry or gold merchandise at pawn shop prices
diagnosis: 305 PawnShops is best for Miami-area residents who own valuable jewelry, gold, or personal items and need quick cash through collateral-based loans, or those seeking to buy quality jewelry at pawn shop prices. The main caveat is that customers must provide physical collateral they're willing to forfeit if the loan isn't repaid, and the website lacks transparent pricing—direct contact is required to understand actual loan terms and rates.
services: Pawning items for short-term collateral-based loans
Item appraisal for pawn or sale
Multi-location pawn services across Miami/South Florida
Customer phone support for pawning questions
Buy and sell services for personal items
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
